talent.doggy_talents_magic.spell_casting:
Equip your dog with a Spell Book (Right-click the dog while holding a Spell Book) to let them cast spells in battle.
Lv.2: Prioritizes injured allies to cast buffs and healing spells.
Lv.3: Kites back when enemies get within 7 blocks.
Higher levels significantly reduce spell cooldowns.
talent.doggy_talents_magic.mana_aura.des:
Emits a mana-regenerating aura around the dog, constantly restoring mana for its owner and allies.
Higher levels increase both the mana regeneration rate and aura range.
talent.doggy_talents_magic.wizard_charme:
Uses the dog's adorable charm to captivate nearby merchant wizards.
Wizards will offer trade discounts and occasionally throw gifts like magic materials or inks towards the dog.
message.doggy_talents_magic.no_talent: This dog hasn't learned the Spell Mastery talent yet!
message.doggy_talents_magic.equipped_spe: Equipped the Spell Book to the dog!
message.doggy_talents_magic.wizard_gift: 【%s was captivated by %s's cuteness and shared a gift!】
